## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what are you proposing? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why does this need to change/be decided? What's the current problem? -->

## Detailed Design

<!-- The technical or structural details of your proposal. Be specific. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you evaluate? Why did you reject them? -->

## Open Questions

<!-- What are you unsure about? Where do you need community input? -->

## Impact

<!-- What does this affect? Other modules? Users? Legal? Performance? -->
